positive: Minimalist line art illustration of a whimsical crescent moon embracing a starry constellation and a stylized, geometric bear silhouette. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, perfect for a print-on-demand apparel graphic. Use a restricted color palette of deep midnight blue, muted gold foil, and crisp cream. High contrast, clean lines, and a sophisticated retro-modern aesthetic, resembling vintage celestial maps combined with modern abstract glyphs. Full body print resolution, scalable vector quality, isolated on a transparent background.
